issues.title: Remove `spring-ai-autoconfigure-model-qianfan` module
issues.body:
The `auto-configurations/spring-ai-autoconfigure-qianfan` [module](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/tree/main/auto-configurations/models/spring-ai-autoconfigure-model-qianfan) remains with an empty [pom.xml](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/blob/main/auto-configurations/models/spring-ai-autoconfigure-model-qianfan/pom.xml) despite not being officially declared and listed in the [parent POM](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/blob/main/pom.xml#L32-L208) as a proper Maven module.

This was even true as of the `1.0.0-M8` release (see [here](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/blob/v1.0.0-M8/auto-configurations/models/spring-ai-autoconfigure-model-qianfan/pom.xml)).

comments.body:
thanks.  There were a few stragglers that I was in the middle of moving and must have got distracted.

They now reside in the [community module](https://github.com/spring-ai-community/qianfan/commit/5390b5fb8042e88a7b97d7cb344534e766a205ee).

There was still a reference in our BOM!  

now the only references to qianfan are in *.adoc.
